steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: The equation 5x + 2y = 31 models Lena's purchase: 5 folders at x dollars each plus 2 markers at y dollars each.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: 5x is the total folder cost; 2y is the total marker cost. Their sum equals 31.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content: Therefore 31 is the total cost for all folders and markers combined.

choiceElimination:
• 'The total cost, in dollars, for all folders purchased': Total folder cost is 5x, not 31. ✗
  • 'The total cost, in dollars, for all markers purchased': Total marker cost is 2y, not 31. ✗
  • 'The total cost, in dollars, for all folders and markers purchased': 5x + 2y = 31 adds both costs, so 31 is the combined total. ✓
  • 'The difference in the total cost, in dollars, between the number of folders and markers purchased': A difference uses subtraction; this equation uses addition. ✗
That matches the correct answer - C is correct.
